findings.description: Section s3 content explicitly lists `responseMessage`, `RESPONSE_HEADER_MESSAGES`, and `RESPONSE_BODY_MESSAGES` as settings that are NOT required for 応答不要メッセージ送信処理. These property/key names are absent from the hints array, so queries about these specific configuration keys would not route to this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source 正常系ケースの準備 note: 「testShotsの定義: responseMessage」「期待値及び準備データの定義: RESPONSE_HEADER_MESSAGES, RESPONSE_BODY_MESSAGES」の3項目が不要と明記されている
